name: ATLAS PMC - Search Party (Isekai)
description:
⚠️ WARNING: POSSIBLE WARCRIMES Isekai with modern forces!

R I F T

_________________________

Oh no! you've been isekaid and sent to a magical fantasy world!-

But this time not by faithful truck-kun but by the Pentagon.

With a squad of elite PMCs assigned under your direct command and Heavily armed with two armoured Humvee's for transport and an MRAP.

C.A.S is also on standby ready to lay down hellfire upon the enemy.

You call the shots on how you approach situations. Either with Diplomacy and bribery or By showing what a defense budget big enough to fight god is capable of when not restrained by ROE.

-Be aware that your actions will have-consequences and appropriate reactions will follow.

_________________________

[ ATLAS Mission Objective ]

Retrieve the princess of a local US ally in the region, Leonhardt.

The princess is the last remaining heir to the throne and without her all of Leonhardt will collapse and so will established American interests and trade in the region.

The stakes are high and the pay is good, recover the princess at any cost and protect American interests.

_________________________

(Bunch of yapping and lore)

Timeline:

•Jan 6 2013 - After the Discovery of the Reality-Rift in the Appalachian Mountains. The US government sends in expeditionary forces to investigate. The portal lead to a whole new world outside our own, codenamed

"Zone Green"

Called Thymiscara by its inhabitants the world is Filled with different new races and creatures while rich with natural oils and resources. Reality itself warps in this realm as spells and magic defy laws of physics and the very theory of relativity.

•Feb 27 2013
creator: Callahan72
